changes.summary: Added a hiding-completed event fired only when the player survives the full hide duration with no capture pressure.
Added chase escape after three room moves and calmed active threats after successful hiding. Tuned near/chase pressure rates downward.
Seeded shorter hide duration and faster capture-gauge decay.
Seeded tuned monster pressure rates and chase escape room count.
Added PlayMode coverage for chase escape by room movement and hiding success calming the monster.

findings.details: Executed 'Escape From Nightmares/Seed Stage1 Hiding Runtime' and 'Escape From Nightmares/Seed Stage1 Monster Runtime'. Unity logs confirmed both seeders.
Stage1 scene contains defaultHideSeconds 5, captureDecayPerSecond 0.34, nearCapturePressurePerSecond 0.06, chaseCapturePressurePerSecond 0.18, and chaseRoomMovesToEscape 3.
No C# compile errors were reported after the final compile. Console included MCP lifecycle entries and normal test-result output.
Unity MCP EditMode test job 76346e41c5bc47f7bd6c576872571316 passed 6/6 tests.
Unity MCP PlayMode test job 4edf1d0811ef4d808b5b71b863eb7dc7 passed 10/10 tests.
